infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ZenRoute needs your location to show nearby jeepneys and track your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ZenRoute needs your location to track jeepney locations in real-time, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: ZenRoute needs your location to track jeepney locations in real-time, even when the app is in the background.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow ZenRoute to use your location to track jeepney locations in real-time, even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ZenRoute needs your location to show nearby jeepneys and track your position on the map.
